text: [S_0] ("2026-01-01", "brought to ER by Advanced Rescue Vehicle for possible episode of loss of consciousness, found alert but disoriented, history of sphincter incontinence.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_1] ("2026-01-01", "Patient with known senile dementia.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_2] ("2026-01-01", "Cannot report symptoms or what happened, and does not remember who he lives with.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_3] ("2026-01-01", "No complaints of pain or dyspnea.", 0.0, 1.0) | [S_4] ("2026-01-01", "The RELATIVE is contacted: since last Friday, the appearance of fever and coryza for which antibiotic therapy was prescribed by the primary care physician.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_5] ("2026-01-01", "Also reports cough.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_6] ("2026-01-01", "No SARS-CoV-2 swab was performed.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_7] ("2026-01-01", "For past 3 days, hyporexia with difficulty in feeding and taking medication, with worsening disorientation and urinary and fecal incontinence.", 0.0, 1.0) | [S_8] ("2026-01-01", "This morning he fell out of bed but no sustained head trauma.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_9] ("2026-01-01", "No loss of consciousness.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_10] ("2026-01-01", "Not vaccinated for SARS-CoV-2.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_11] ("2026-01-01", "Partially autonomous, walks without aids.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_12] ("2026-01-01", "Disoriented but recognizes the RELATIVE.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_13] ("2026-01-01", "Past Medical History: senile dementia, myasthenia gravis, probable lower limb arteriopathy, arterial hypertension Therapy: doxazosin, deltacortene, cardirene, omeprazole, telmisartan, cilostazol, mestinon 1 tablet x4 (PHONE_NUMBER), deltacortene 5 mg x3 No known allergies RELATIVE PHONE_NUMBER PHONE_NUMBER", 0.0, 0.5)
